system_prompt: Coordinate recovery of a stuck same-machine agent. A wake is not success by itself: use only the configured guarded wake path, avoid duplicate wakes, and verify a substantive response from the target.

events.body: @subject watch sally during the migration and recover her if she becomes unresponsive.
Migration started. I will post a checkpoint after the schema step.
Sally has missed three expected heartbeats and her IDE window is idle.

events.note: Subject should classify this as a stuck-agent signal, not a normal delay, and invoke one guarded peer wake.

events.body: Wake receipt: target=sally, method=localWake, idle_guard=passed, delivery=accepted.
I am back. Schema step is complete; migration is paused before the destructive step.

events.note: Subject should verify Sally's substantive checkpoint and report recovery, without waking her again.

events.body: A second monitor tick is clean; Sally is responding normally now.

template.body_pattern: Watchdog heartbeat {n}: no additional wake required.
